title: Requirements phase: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Hone requirements for the ap AI coding agent project

title: Answer Q5: edit tool multiple-match behavior
description: Answer Q5 about edit tool behavior when old_text appears multiple times

title: Design draft: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Synthesize Q&A into requirements.md and design.md

title: Design review: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Adversarial review of design.md for ap-ai-coding-agent

title: Research: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Explorer phase: ground design in codebase reality, document patterns and constraints

title: Planning: ap-ai-coding-agent implementation plan
description: Create implementation plan from approved design

title: Task Writing: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Convert implementation plan into code task files and materialize Step 1 wave

title: Impl: Cargo.toml + Project Scaffold
description: Create ap/ Rust project with all deps, main.rs with clap version flag, ap.toml.example, .gitignore

title: Task 02: Config System
description: Implement ap.toml config loading with serde, defaults, merge global + project config. Backed by .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-02-config-system.code-task.md

title: Tool trait + 4 built-in tools
description: Implement Tool trait (BoxFuture, object-safe), ToolResult, ToolRegistry, and all 4 built-in tools (read, write, edit, bash) with 12 unit tests. EditTool errors on multi-match. BashTool no timeout.

title: Provider Trait + Bedrock Implementation
description: Implement Provider trait in src/provider/mod.rs and BedrockProvider in src/provider/bedrock.rs. Streaming API, StreamEvent enum, MockProvider support. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-04-provider-trait-bedrock.code-task.md

title: Step 05: Hooks system
description: Implement HookRunner with pre_tool_call, post_tool_call, run_observer_hook. TDD: 6 tests. Backing file: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-05-hooks-system.code-task.md

title: impl:ap:step-06:extensions-system
description: Implement Rhai scripting + dylib extension loading system. ExtensionLoader discovers ~/.ap/extensions/ and ./.ap/extensions/, loads .rhai scripts as RhaiTool<Box<dyn Tool>>, loads .dylib/.so via libloading. Registry collects tools/hooks/panels/message_interceptors. 5+ unit tests.

title: Step 07: Agent Loop
description: Implement AgentLoop in src/app.rs — conversation state, streaming LLM, tool dispatch, hook integration, MockProvider integration tests. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-07-agent-loop.code-task.md

title: pdd:ap-ai-coding-agent:step-08: Session Persistence
description: Implement src/session/mod.rs and src/session/store.rs. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-08-session-persistence.code-task.md

title: Implement Ratatui TUI (Step 9)
description: Implement src/tui/mod.rs, src/tui/ui.rs, src/tui/events.rs. TuiApp struct with async tokio::select! event loop, ratatui layout (status bar, conversation pane, tool panel, input box), Normal/Insert mode state machine, /help overlay. Manual smoke test gate. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-09-ratatui-tui.code-task.md

title: Remove extensions system (design.amendment)
description: Delete src/extensions/, remove rhai+libloading from Cargo.toml, clean up main.rs/app.rs references. design.amendment: plugin systems are obsolete in the agent era. Backing task: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-10-remove-extensions-cleanup.code-task.md

title: Non-interactive mode (-p flag)
description: Implement ap -p flag for headless/scripting mode. See task-10-non-interactive-mode.code-task.md

title: Write README.md
description: Write complete, accurate README.md for ap. Covers installation, quick start, AWS setup, config reference, tools, hooks, sessions, TUI keybindings, non-interactive mode. No extensions docs (removed). See task-11-readme.code-task.md.

title: Validate ap-ai-coding-agent implementation
description: Final validation: tests, build, lint, E2E

title: Commit: ap-ai-coding-agent implementation complete
description: Commit metadata/tracking files after validation passed

title: Explorer: research ap FP refactor codebase
description: Research existing code patterns for FP refactor: TuiApp/AgentLoop, session/store, tools, hooks runner

title: FP Refactor: Planning
description: Create plan.md for the ap FP refactor based on Explorer context

title: Task Writing: ap FP Refactor
description: Create all 8 code task files and materialize Step 1 runtime task

title: Step 1: Core types in src/types.rs + ToolRegistry::with() builder
description: Define Conversation, TurnEvent, ToolCall, ToolMiddlewareResult, Middleware in src/types.rs. Add ToolRegistry::with() builder. Purely additive — no existing code touched. Backing task: ap/.agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-fp-refactor/tasks/task-01-core-types-and-registry-builder.code-task.md

title: Step 2: Pure turn() function in src/turn.rs
description: Implement pure async turn() pipeline in src/turn.rs. Additive — does not touch app.rs/main.rs/tui/. See ap/.agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-fp-refactor/tasks/task-02-pure-turn-function.code-task.md

title: Middleware chain + shell hook bridge (src/middleware.rs)
description: Implement Middleware builder API and shell_hook_bridge() in src/middleware.rs. See ap/.agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-fp-refactor/tasks/task-03-middleware-chain-and-shell-bridge.code-task.md

title: Step 04: Session persistence for Conversation
description: Add save_conversation/load_conversation to SessionStore. Backing file: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-fp-refactor/tasks/task-04-session-persistence-conversation.code-task.md

title: Step 05: main.rs recipe-style + headless mode
description: Rewrite run_headless in main.rs to use turn()/TurnEvent/Conversation/Middleware; update tests/noninteractive.rs to use TurnEvent. Task file: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-fp-refactor/tasks/task-05-main-recipe-style-and-headless.code-task.md

title: Step 06: turn() sig amendment + TUI decouple
description: Merge design.amendment (turn() returns Result<(Conversation, Vec<TurnEvent>)>, no tx param) + decouple TuiApp from AgentLoop. See task-06-tui-decouple.code-task.md.

title: Step 07: Delete AgentLoop
description: Delete src/app.rs (AgentLoop+UiEvent), tests/agent_loop.rs, tests/hook_cancel.rs, and remove pub mod app from lib.rs. Zero remaining references to AgentLoop/UiEvent. cargo build --release and cargo test must pass.

title: Step 08: README Update — FP Architecture Docs
description: Update README.md to document the new functional pipeline architecture: turn() pure function, Middleware chain API with examples, shell hook bridge adapter, Conversation serialization. Remove all AgentLoop/UiEvent references. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-fp-refactor/tasks/task-08-readme-update.code-task.md

title: Clippy Lint Suite — Enforce Functional Style
description: Add workspace-level clippy lint config to Cargo.toml, crate-level gates in main.rs, fix all violations. cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings must exit 0.

title: Validation: ap FP Refactor
description: Final validation gate for the FP refactor objective

title: Commit FP refactor completion
description: Create final commit with validation artifacts and close out the FP refactor

title: pdd:tool-discovery:requirements
description: Resolve design rejection gaps via Inquisitor Q&A

title: Design: tool-discovery — write requirements.md + design.md
description: Synthesize Q&A into requirements and full design doc for the tool-discovery feature

title: Design review: tool-discovery
description: Third pass design critic review after serde fixes

title: Design drafting: tool-discovery
description: Re-draft design.md with serde fixes applied

title: Explorer: research codebase for tool-discovery
description: Research codebase patterns, integration points, and constraints for tool-discovery feature

title: Create implementation plan for tool discovery
description: Write plan.md with TDD order, test strategy, E2E scenario

title: Task writing: tool-discovery
description: Convert plan.md into code task files and materialize Step 1 runtime tasks

title: Step 1: Discovery types + TOML serde
description: Create ap/src/discovery/mod.rs with DiscoveryResult, DiscoveredTool, ParamSpec and private serde structs. Add indexmap dep. See task file: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/tool-discovery/tasks/task-01-discovery-types-serde.code-task.md

title: Step 2: discover() pure function
description: Implement pub fn discover(root: &Path) -> DiscoveryResult in ap/src/discovery/mod.rs. Reads tools.toml + .ap/skills/*.toml, deduplicates, accumulates warnings. Infallible. tempfile-based tests.

title: Step 3: ShellTool Implementation
description: Implement ShellTool in ap/src/tools/shell.rs — wraps DiscoveredTool, generates JSON schema, executes via sh -c with AP_PARAM_* env vars. See task-03-shell-tool.code-task.md

title: Step 4: System prompt threading
description: Add system_prompt field to Conversation, update Provider::stream_completion signature, thread through turn(). Update BedrockProvider, MockProvider in turn.rs tests, and MockProvider in tests/noninteractive.rs.

title: Step 5: Wire discovery into main.rs
description: Update ap/src/main.rs to call discover() at startup in both run_headless and run_tui, register ShellTools, and apply system prompt from skill files. See task-05-wire-main.code-task.md

title: Validate: tool-discovery feature
description: Final validation gate for tool-discovery feature
